settings.brand_des:
Cancellation Policy

Orders can only be cancelled before they are dispatched from our warehouses, subject to a gateway charge of 2.5% against your order. Refunds for cancelled orders will be credited to the original payment account within 15 days of acceptance. Once orders are shipped, they cannot be cancelled, and a deduction of 75 will be applied if the order is returned to us for prepaid orders.

Return Policy

At Ombre Bliss, we aim to provide our customers with the best shopping experience possible, enriching their lives with our products. Due to the nature of our items, once they have been opened or used, they cannot be returned to us for resale.

Please note that our products contain active natural extracts and ingredients. Damage resulting from neglect, improper usage, or incorrect application is not covered under this Policy. Additionally, any adverse reactions to specific products or ingredients are not covered, and we strongly advise conducting patch tests as recommended with each product.

Refund Policy

Ombre Bliss holds no responsibility for any damage occurring after the products have been delivered. If you encounter issues such as missing items, leakage, breakage, damage, or receiving the wrong product, you must provide an unboxing video along with the original packaging to support your claim.

The product will be exchanged or returned within 4-5 business days while the refund process may take up to 8-20 days. Refunds would only be initiated after physically seeing the products. To initiate a refund, please contact our customer care team at +91 99711 13475 or email us at support@ombrebliss.com with relevant images and videos, using the subject line “Refund For [Your Order Number]”. If your package appears tampered with, damaged, or defective upon delivery, kindly refuse to accept it from the delivery partner.

If your order is marked as delivered but you haven’t received it within 3 days, please contact our customer care team at +91 99711 13475. Refunds will not be issued after this period. Please note that delivery charges are non-refundable. For cash on delivery orders, refunds will be processed to the provided bank account within 4-7 working days.

All refund claims must be made within 24 hours of order delivery, providing the necessary details. Once accepted, refunds may take up to 15 days to be processed from the date of acceptance by Ombre Bliss. Rest assured, we will provide all relevant details, including transaction IDs and screenshots, once the refund process has begun.

In cases of extreme damage during transit (such as leakage, breakage, or missing items), a refund or exchange can be initiated after thorough verification of the refund policy. Please contact our customer care team within 24-48 hours of receiving a damaged or broken product.
